title: limeum fruticosum
intro: Limeum fruticosum, also known as the shrubby limeum, is a succulent plant species in the family Linderniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Limeum fruticosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory problems and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Limeum fruticosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
